feature_name: Dynamic font loading to eliminate font swap layout shift

completed_tasks.title: Extend app.html inline script with fontUrls map and DOM injection; remove static links from +layout.svelte
completed_tasks.description: Add a 20-entry fontUrls object literal to the existing FOUC-prevention inline script in web/src/app.html. After the existing font-slug resolution, add a conditional block that looks up fontUrls[fontSlug] and, when truthy, injects four <link> elements into document.head (preconnect x2, preload, stylesheet). Initialize fontSlug='sora' before the preference-reading loop so the default works for anonymous users. Remove lines 401-403 from web/src/routes/+layout.svelte (the two preconnect links and the all-fonts stylesheet link).
completed_tasks.done_when: The inline script in app.html contains a fontUrls map with exactly 20 entries (one per web-font slug, no entries for georgia/sf-pro/system). The conditional injection block creates preconnect, preload, and stylesheet links only for web-font slugs. fontSlug defaults to 'sora'. Lines 401-403 in +layout.svelte are deleted. npm run lint, npm run check, and npm run test all pass (existing tests may break if whitelist tests depend on the removed lines -- that is expected and will be fixed in T2).

completed_tasks.title: Add fontUrls sync tests to fouc-whitelist.test.ts
completed_tasks.description: Add an extractInlineObjectMap helper function that parses the fontUrls object literal from app.html (matching var fontUrls = { ... }; and extracting 'key': 'value' pairs). Add three new test cases inside the existing describe('FOUC whitelist sync') block: (1) every non-system slug in validFonts has an entry in fontUrls and no extra entries exist, (2) georgia, sf-pro, and system are absent from the map, (3) every URL value contains 'display=swap'.
completed_tasks.done_when: Three new passing tests exist in fouc-whitelist.test.ts. The extractInlineObjectMap helper correctly parses the fontUrls map from app.html. All existing tests in the file continue to pass. npm run test passes with no regressions.

history.note: Feature initiated: dynamic font loading to eliminate FOUT layout shift on cold PWA launches
Moved to discovery. PM inbox written for requirements gathering.
Discovery complete. Exec plan written at docs/exec-plans/active/2026-05-08-dynamic-font-loading.md. Requirements, constraints, acceptance criteria, risks, and test plan defined.
Moved to design. PE inbox written for technical design.

Design complete. PE validated approach, specified fontUrls map with 20 entries, DOM injection sequence, font slug resolution logic, 3 new unit tests, 2 additional alternatives, 2 additional risks. Performance impact strictly positive.
Moved to tasks. Broke design into 2 tasks: T1 (app.html fontUrls map + DOM injection + remove static links from +layout.svelte), T2 (3 new sync tests in fouc-whitelist.test.ts).
T1 complete (built, 359 tests passing). Routing T2: add 3 fontUrls sync tests and extractInlineObjectMap helper to fouc-whitelist.test.ts.
Both T1 and T2 built and passing. Moved both tasks to verified status and to completed_tasks. Routing to build-specialist for full quality gate run and quality-assurance for code review in parallel.
PM acceptance review complete. All 14 acceptance criteria pass. Build verification confirmed: 362 unit tests, 17 E2E smoke tests, lint/check/cargo all clean. Recommending advance to Done.
